sections.heading: The Application of CNC in Mold Manufacturing
sections.text: The Application of CNC in Mold Manufacturing Published Feb 28, 2024, updated Dec 27, 2024 5 min Computer Numerical Control (CNC) technology plays a crucial role in modern mold manufacturing, offering precision, efficiency, and versatility. Principles of CNC technology CNC stands for Computer Numerical Control. It is a technology that involves the use of computers to control machine tools and other manufacturing processes. In CNC systems, computers interpret and execute numerical instructions to perform tasks such as cutting, milling, drilling, or additive manufacturing (e.g., 3D printing). CNC technology is widely used in various industries, including manufacturing, automotive, and electron...
